Kevin just flew back from Columbia to visit with ES and tour their facility.
Hilton Haven had a number of products on the job and Aldora won the entire package.

This quote needs to be addressed again.  Aldora quote went from $12,000 to $17,000 and customer was very upset.  A few changes were made.  Low E was added.  Anodized went to paint, and one door lite changed to SGP.  Customer complained $5500 price difference was unacceptable and no other vendors treats them in this manner.  Questioning whether to send additional orders to Aldora.  Oldcastle is the other vendor.  We have a $100,000 order now pending because Matt and Tim feel uncomfortable sending us orders now.

Aldora lost the Westin Doors due to water and air testing.  Needed to meet 12 psi with high rise sills for water doors.  Oldcastle got this job and the casino project because they could provide thermally broke doors.
Took this one from Oldcastle due to it being pre glazed.  Also, Rob was impressed with our lead times. K2 Summit Doors and FS 300 frames.
Waiting on school grant money then moving forward. They only use Aldora for storefront
old castle long leadtimes and no help when needed. Likes Charleston branch help
Sean said lost project not ready to move forward because they are out of money.the customer
They only use Aldora for storefront now  because we always pick up the phone and help

Tiffany said its won and likes how we are shipping direct now. Less problems
Project won but waiting for GC to do mold removal then can move forward
GC lost contract so they are out. OLD Castle is long leadtimes if they even get one.
Just left the Key team.  Missy said these fire station doors are still pending.  They have been bad for a while so should hete something soon.  Used Aldora numbers on this project.
Joey has had this re-quoted a couple times.  Looks like it will be our project.   Has started using Aldora more on storefront opportunities.   This is our FS 300 with K2 Summit Doors.

Chris has more Doors for the strip center coming up for us.  Oldcastle struggling with lead times and quality.  Loved the quick turn on our door and framing material.  Shipped missing the top pivot.  Chris made it work.  Will see more storefront here now!
Ryann has to change one thing on quote but said its sold or won only using Aldora for storefront
The project fell through the first time so getting second look but needs a discount to get project.

Glass Doctor used our numbers on this job.  They lost the project because the owner was a real jersey and Frank did not want to work for him.  The GC also had 3 other Glass companies on site looking at this project.   Frank has been very loyal and only using us for these quick hitting storefront projects.
Aldora was the only company to quote this job.  Job is pending.  Frank used our FS 300 with 1 5/16 SB 70.
This project is for a good friend of an employee of Glass Doctor.   They should be getting this job.  We will win this one if it's awarded to Glass Doctor.

Oldcastle and CRL were Lisa's go to suppliers for metal.  I have gotten her and their NC branch to switch to Aldora and we have started to do a lot of work with them.  Occasionally has to use OBE for specd material but really wants Aldora to get the work!
Lost they didn’t get the job the GC lost the bid

Lost project for pricing. Coral is messing up bad here. Trulite no one answers call or questions. Aldora going to get all storefront here.

FS 300 door and frame.  Lami glass.

Aldora needs a 2 x 5 center set system to compete in this west coast market.  This quote is for customers own house and wanted pricing help.  Brian and I got down to a 15% discount but not sure it's enough.  Eliza putting together the revised quote tomorrow.   Also needs teack dimensions and hardware used for handle and locks.
Lisa gave Aldora 3 more storefront and door orders today!
they just got another look at the project the GC was fired and new GC likes their work
Cliff is trying to use Aldora for his smaller projects. This was revised 4 times.  Got the nice order!
they said our surcharge puts us out of the running over competitors they do like our systems just surcharge or general cost puts us over others.
trulite is quicker on quotes and not so much back and forth fees thank you for the help on these quotes. Coral Springs very slow at partying quotes out.
He just submitted the job. Will keep us posted
Josh really likes the frames Fabricated.   OBE sells sticks only.  This is a car rental job in Ft. Myers damaged from the storm and just now getting to it.

This job will be ordered with Aldora.  Suzanne is waiting on the deposit.  Once received she will place the order.

old castle has better pricing but Aldora has better customer service and lead times
Nick sent the order in for Queens job on 4/6.  Eliza put it into production 4/7.  Nick sent another doir opportunity in to us this morning for a quote.  Lead times most important now.

Alec wanted to go over quote and how to order once it comes through.
called Ron and he wanted to plaace the order and more storefront coming he likes aldora
Eric is awarding this project to me today.  Lead times determining factor.   Owner and President coming to CS for Vista View presentation and storefront tour.
Taren was reluctant to tell me much about our competition on this one.  IOS is a. Eric good account and I think if they get the job, so will we.
This job was revised three times.  Robert will be sending the purchase order over to me today.
they sent to me order but had them email the office. Great job team.

This is only one part of the job.  There are 4 more separate quotes on this project.   They dollar amount ranges from $47,781 to $79,302.  It's a huge job.  Probably will get re-bid again.  Good news is they love me and Aldora and I can get last look.
Rice gives us many opportunities to quote their projects.   They typically get 3 or 4 numbers from different suppliers.  Eric has been great to work with and tries to throw jobs my way.

Spoke with Kris at length about Aldora becoming his vendor for storefront.  He is done with Trulite who has left him without answers and/or solutions to their issues.  Kris has another window job with 13 frames that will be coming our way as well.  Wanted to make sure I don't talk pricing with his customers,  which I would never do.

Josh at Spray Pro wants to use Aldora on this job but our pricing is higher than Oldcastle.   Tried to sell lead time and quality to Josh but his customer is all about price.  Sent to CS to see if we had room to move.

Mike uses Aldora almost exclusively.   However, he has had to wait longer to get quotes back and recently had to wait on a quick price request for a closer.  His customer happened to be waiting in his shop and he never heard back from our metal team in CS fast enough.
bob called for phase 2 for 11 right dooors. Very happy received the last order and sent photos so happy..

Followed up on these two doors.  RD wanted them quoted separately.   I showed him where we did that.  He just looked at the last page number.  Sends most quotes to Oldcastle and Trulite for numbers.   Mentioned about Oldcastle being in financial trouble and Trulite raising pricing, ESC, and $12.50 service fees.
THEY DID NOT WIN JOB
Kris placed this order today with Mike in Charleston.

OK, this project is too big for IOS.  When I was talking with Cliff at Englewood Glass he mentioned Taren has turned this over to him.  It will need revised with 10" Bottom rails and mullions but it looks like Aldora has a good shot at landing this one.  Cliff is on vacation next week but will call me when he returns to discuss!

Robert ordered this for a high end residential home on Marco Island.  Seeing codes changing to be more restrictive and needing higher design pressures.  Also discussed our Vista View line of window and doors.
This quote has been revised a few times.  Got the go ahead but needs another 1/2 taken off.  Will send new quote and dimensions and should be an order.

This was originally quoted non impact and a contract was agreed upon.  GC came back saying it needed to be impact frames and doors.  I sent this to Eliza a few times for price revisions.  It will be an order but we had to offer substantial pricing help for Josh.

Mike sent me the purchase order on Whit's today.  Pounded him late yesterday afternoon in his office for the order.  Just had to wait on a contract.  K2 Summit and frame. Will start seeing a lit more storefront from All Glass.
Dan was extremely happy to get this contract.  These doors are being used in a ahowrokm and I expect to get a lot of future work from this opportunity.
This quote was delayed in the quoting process.  Stacey Hill took a few extra days to get numbers back to Heather and James.  James sent the purchase order over just now.
Cliff finally sent the signed off quote in today.  This had to be revised a few times but order was placed this morning.   Cliff still waiting on back order from previous order that shipped Monday.
brent said old castle is letting him down looking for new vendor to work with. a lot of big projects coming wants to quote in fenavision for faster turn around times.

Trulite salesman has been in here hard trying to get Chris to switch vendors for storefront.   My relationship here is so strong Chris kicked him out of his office.  Called me to say he was placing the order and has a lot more work coming for us.  Landing the Benderson account has been huge for Chris. Laurie and I were guests at his charity Plate Project where we donated $1000 to the cause.  Good relationship here.

Randy needed a double door quickly and gave us an opportunity.   He signed off on the quote this morning.   Will send more opportunities with faster lead time now with Aldora.
Chris placed this order but his confirmation does not match the quote he signed.  I tried calling Chloe but nobody answered the phone in the metal department.

Nick called to tell me he ordered these 3 K2 Summit Doors for the Church project.   Nick had been using Oldcastle but got fed up with the lies and lead times.  Said OBE is at 16 weeks for these doors.  Willing to pay a little extra money and get them faster to move on to the next job!

Chris needed this quote turned quickly and Eliza came through.  It got us the job.  Mix of Vista View single Gung and our 090 system.
Cliff ordered this K2 Summit door with a 1 5/16 Solarban 60 glass make up.  Lead time and price were both factors.  Cliff is giving us a lot more opportunities on the smaller, quick hitting projects.
two changes from last quote but placing order Jeremy and talked today about project

Gene is pretty sure he will get this project which we will then get.  Wanted to go pre glazed on this one rather than sticks from Oldcastle.   OBE takes 2 weeks just to get stock lengths then has to be Fabricated by Townsend.   Gene will be giving Aldora a lit more opportunities.
Josh said this quote is still.pending however, he is getting ready to send us EVO, Carabbas storefront door today.  Waiting for Spencer to return with final sizes. Very slow right now.
Eric gave us this project today because our lead times were better than ES.  Their price was better but would not tell me by how much.  This might be our first big job with JMI.
Jacob ordered this McKinnley wide stile door painted black from Coral Springs because Charleston does not carry wide stile in black.  6-8 week lead.  Will see more work out of Cypress.
Erik only uses aldora for storefront I and this one he has a great shot of gaining.
old castle lead times long and Nick needs better terms not cod to order more. Getting with heather. Nick placing order this morning just had to change door numbers.

This was the job Mike asked if we could re-visit the price and get $1 lower than the competition.   We did and Mike sent the purchase order in today.  FS 300 frames with the K2 Summit door.  9/16 Solarban 70 lami build up.  With competitive pricing Aldora will see more work as All Glass tries to move away from ES.

Dwayne gave us this order today due to quicker lead times than Oldcastle.   Double doors with 9/16 bronze laminated.  Dwayne, Jake, and I had a long discussion about Oldcastle and their issues currently.
They placed the order but compared to pgt we were better price and lead times
terry likes aldora lead times because he doesn’t know when he will get it from old castle
Mike gave me this order since I am in Cape Coral today.  No competition on this one.  Mike only used Aldora for his quote.  Good guy who is pretty loyal to us!
Jacob said he will be placing the order today for the SMI 245 McKinley door. This is prepped for customer hardware. It's using 1" Clear Tempered IG.

Josh originally got this quoted with non impact frames and glass. Gave his customer his number. Then calls Aldora to say its impact frames and glass and needs help on pricing. Aldora offers help but it's too little and to late. He went with Oldcastle and is now upset with how the whole deal was handled. Spray Pro is a shower door company doing storefront for an acquaintance and it went south fast. Now Josh has no faith in Aldora or our service. It was his mistake originally but will not admit to it.

Olin only used Aldora on this non-impact McKinley door with pivots. SMI 45 bronze with 1/4 bronze glass. Olin has been extremely loyal to Aldora for many years and only occasionally gets numbers from Trulite to keep us honest.
Lucas very happy just found out we don’t offer shapes in quote but quoted that way in notes
es windows spec but switching to Aldora we did good on windemere.

All Glass list this project. Robert got quotes from Euro Craft and Aldora. Euro Craft has done two previous jobs with All Glass and there have been quality issues on both jobs. Joey told me their service techs came to the site to adjust the doors after he tried working on them twice. It took 3 weeks for them to even respond. Right now is a great opportunity to get in bed with these guys. They have millions of dollars in quotes and jobs. Vista View NEEDS to make a sales presentation with me soon. Now is our window of opportunity with ES, Euro Craft, and Trulite all under performing.
